steps.title: Write the equation for the first game
steps.content:
Angela scored 700 points by collecting 20 coins and 10 stars. Since each coin is worth $c$ points and each star is worth $s$ points:
$$20c + 10s = 700$$

steps.title: Write the equation for the second game and identify the answer
steps.content:
Angela scored 850 points by collecting 25 coins and 12 stars:
$$25c + 12s = 850$$

The system of equations is:
$$20c + 10s = 700$$
$$25c + 12s = 850$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
